content.en:
"One move to kill the Nine-Star Earth Venerable?"

The Earth Splitter frowned slightly.

Although he and the other two ten-star Earth Venerables could also do this kind of thing, Ye Tian was very easy to kill Guan Ling, this was not an ordinary ten-star Earth Venerable, at least it was also a top ten-star Earth Venerable.

In their intelligence, the top ten star Earth Venerables in the Eternal Universe were only in double digits, and those ten star Earth Venerables were basically stared at by the powerhouses of the Xulong Holy Land and the powerhouses of other Holy Lands.

This time, their move on the Protoss was just a prelude, they wanted to test whether there were other hidden forces in the Eternal Universe, if not, once the Protoss was taken, it would be the turn of the Demon Race and other cosmic clans.

And it was not easy for those targeted ten-star Earth Venerables to come to the rescue, and Ye Tian was not one of their intelligence powerhouses.

It's no wonder that their intelligence is inaccurate, it's really that Ye Tian is too low-key, only the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other powerhouses know Ye Tian's strength, and the ordinary Earth Venerable doesn't know at all.

"Hide the strong!"

Earth-splitting spear venerable dark way.

He didn't think that Ye Tian was a god general, with the cultivation conditions of the Eternal Universe, it was very difficult to become a god general, how could a god general level appear casually?

In his opinion, Ye Tian was at most a top-notch ten-star Earth Venerable.

Three against one, they hope greatly!

"Surround him!"

Earth-splitting Spear said.

Whew!!

The three ten-star earth venerables stood in three directions, and the momentum locked on Ye Tian, and one by one the strongest treasures appeared, suppressing this area.

"Do you really want to be my enemy?" Ye Tian said coldly: "Leave immediately, I may spare your life!"

He actually has no real contradiction with these people, even if it is a creature of two universes, but this is nothing, if the two universes merge into one universe in the future, the two sides will naturally be creatures of a big universe.

Therefore, if the people of the Cangyu Universe were not enemies of him, he would not be wiped out.

Of course, the real reason is because he doesn't want to make a large number of enemies, if he kills these Earth Lords and provokes a god general, and then kills the god general, wouldn't it be a full-scale war with the Cangyu universe?

"Arrogance!"

The Earth Splitter snorted coldly.

"Earthbreaker!"

The Earth Splitting Spear Venerable stabbed at him, and countless gun shadows shrouded the void, each of which contained the power of the Great Dao, and its power was enough to kill any Nine Star Earth Venerable.

And the power of this blow was enough to kill even the weaker Ten Star Earth Venerable!

The Silver Moon Sword Venerable and another ten-star Earth Venerable, the Phantom Demon Venerable, also made a move, and the shot was a killing move.

They don't want to test anything, in this level, temptation is equivalent to looking for death, in case the other party is very strong, they can't test the killing move, and it is easy to be killed by the enemy in one move.

Under the full strength of the three ten-star Earth Venerables, even the Ten Star Extreme Combat Power Earth Venerables would be injured, and they didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to stop it.

"Hey!"

A sigh resounded through the void.

"Why do you die?"

Ye Tian muttered.

I saw him wave his hand, the void froze, and he immediately used the law as a knife and slashed lightly.

Tear and pull!!

The space where the three ten-star earth honorable levels were located was shattered one after another, and the sword qi penetrated through the body.

In the blink of an eye, the bodies of the Silver Moon Sword Venerable and the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable shattered, and the supreme treasure in their hands was also cracked.

"God Will ......"

The two Ten Star Earth Lords completely dissipated with incredible thoughts.

"Hey, you're not dead!"

Ye Tian looked at the Shadow Demon Venerable curiously, although the other party was hit hard, he was not dead.

"It turned out that I had cultivated a relatively powerful life-preserving divine power, plus a few life-preserving treasures, so I didn't die in one of my sword qi, otherwise, even the ten-star extreme earth venerable wouldn't be able to withstand the sword qi just now!" Ye Tiandao.

The Shadow Demon Venerable had no thoughts of the rest of his life at this time, and he was very frightened.

He never thought that there was another god general level in the Eternal Universe, and it didn't seem to be an ordinary god general level, so he casually killed the Earth Splitting Qiangzun, an Earth Venerable who was infinitely close to the ten-star extreme, could this be a weaker God General?

"This Divine General-level Lord, spare my life, I am the Tenth Star Earth Venerable of the Xulong Holy Land, the Lord of our Holy Land is also a Divine General, and I am also a mid-star Divine General, for the sake of our Holy Lord Xulong Divine General, please spare my life, I am willing to persuade the Xulong Divine General to make friends with the Eternal Universe!"

"It's late!" Ye Tian said lightly: "If you say this before I make a move, you may still be able to live, but now that I have killed the two of you Ten Star Earth Venerables, how can I make friends?"

Ye Tian struck again, and slashed at the Shadow Demon Venerable with a knife, and his strength was more than twice as strong as before.

"No!"

The Shadow Demon Venerable tried his best to escape, and even burned all his strength, flesh, and soul to urge the life-saving supernatural power, but Ye Tian stabbed through his body, and his soul and body all turned into nothingness.

"Run!"

The other Earth Honorables and Human Honorables of the Xulong Holy Land were panicked and fled in other directions.

"Hunyuan Domain!"

Ye Tian used this method to cover this area.

Under the suppression of the Hunyuan Domain, those Earth Venerables couldn't escape at all, and they were squeezed into a blood mist by the power of the Hunyuan Domain, and all of them were wiped out.

When the powerhouses of the Xulong Holy Land died, the First Divine Lord came out of the Divine Realm and hurriedly thanked: "Thank you Wanfa Supreme for helping!"

"I promised to help the Protoss make a move, and now that I've made a move, we're clear!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Wanfa Supreme, if you leave, the powerhouse of the Xulong Holy Land will come again, and at that time, our Protoss will still not be able to keep it. My agreement with the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws is to ask the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws to take action once to relieve the crisis of the Protoss, and now the crisis of the Protoss is still there!"

The First Divine Lord spoke.

He knew that saying this would offend Ye Tian, but there was no way, if Ye Tian left, their Protoss would need to bear the roar of the Xulong Holy Land, and the Protoss would inevitably perish.

"Hmph, First Divine Master, according to what you said, wouldn't I have to stay in the Protoss for the rest of my life to protect you, otherwise you keep saying that the Protoss is in crisis, and I will never be able to help you?"

Ye Tian asked.

The First Divine Lord said: "Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, you only need to garrison the Protoss for a hundred years, even if the Protoss crisis is resolved, how about it?"

"A hundred years!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then nodded: "Okay, I will stay in the Protoss for a hundred years, but if the Terran is in crisis, I will leave immediately!"

"Good!"

The First Divine Lord replied, and at the same time breathed a sigh of relief.
